case_title: NORTHRIDGE COOPERATIVE HOMES, A CALIFORNIA CORPORA VS. CATHERINE M. HUNTLEY et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT HUNTLEY, CATHERINE M. STAFFORD, LAUREN N.
